articles.title: EU Says It's Powerless to Stop PlayStation From Killing Discs - IGN
articles.description: As gamers sign online petitions and swarm upon each and every PlayStation social media post, the EU has said it’s powerless to actually stop Sony — and indeed any company — from killing discs.

articles.title: Pokémon GO Fest Global 2026: Sunday Raids - Pokémon GO Hub
articles.description: Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global takes place from July 11-12, from 10:00 am local time, to 7:00 pm local time on each day. Mega Mewtwo X and Y will make their Pokémon GO debut, along with Zeraora! To celebrate 10 years of Pokémon GO, this years Global GO Fest eve…

articles.title: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait? - BBC
articles.description: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.

articles.title: iOS 27: What's New With the Mail App - MacRumors
articles.description: Apple's Mail app is getting some useful updates in iOS 27, with Apple making big improvements to search and introducing new AI features.   Search...

articles.title: Pixel 11 Pro Fold FCC listing adds support for a big Tensor G6 shake-up - Android Authority
articles.description: Today's Pixel 11 Pro Fold FCC document dump appears to support rumors of Google moving to a MediaTek modem.
